changelog:
What's new in v2.4.5:
- AI tools now work WITHOUT Rootfs (create files/folders directly)
- Create directory & delete entry tools (auto-approved)
- Download individual files or folders as ZIP
- DuckDuckGo search with up to 20 results
- Fixed crash on minimize/slow network
- Default "Grex-Spce" workspace for all chats
- Fixed 32-bit crash (armeabi-v7a)
